source_pr.title: executor: fix bug about topn pushing down.
source_pr.body:
make right pb for topn and index double read.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select a from t where c >= 2 order by b desc limit 1") (executor/executor_test.go)

fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: result = tk.MustQuery("select a from t where c >= 2 order by b desc limit 1") (executor/executor_test.go)
